chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5561of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.28115/2021 2. For orders as to maintainability of CMA No.40501/2023. 3. For hearing of CMA No.2067/2020 4. For hearing of CMA No.740/2020 5. For hearing of CMA No.17811/2019 6. For order on MIT report dated 24.10.2019 7. For order on MIT report dated 30.12.2019 8. For hearing of main case. 05-05-2025 Petitioner No.1 Ghulam Hussain for self and attorney of other petitioners is present in person. Mr. Fawad Syed, advocate for respondents Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General This petition is pending since 2014 and remains listed for orders as to maintainability. Twelve petitioners have filed this petition seeking directions to a private company to give them employment. Petitioner appearing in person is confronted as to how writ may be issued to a private entity and he remains unable to assist. It is also not demonstrated as to what employment was specifically sought and whether the same was denied. Be that as it may, the arguments articulated raise serious factual controversies which are not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, the case argued by the petitioner appears to be misconceived. Petition is dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
